name: Vor
description: Vor is a Norse goddess associated with wisdom and knowledge. She is known as the goddess who knows everything, or at least is very perceptive and aware of all that happens in the world. Vor is said to be so knowledgeable that nothing can be hidden from her. She is often invoked for insight and understanding, particularly in matters of love, relationships, and secrets. While Vor doesn't feature prominently in the surviving Norse texts, her existence is confirmed in the Prose Edda, specifically in the Gylfaginning section, where she is listed among the Asynjur (goddesses). Because of the limited textual evidence, much about Vor is left to interpretation and speculation. Some scholars suggest she may have been a more significant figure in earlier Norse paganism. Her name, meaning 'careful' or 'attentive,' further emphasizes her role as an all-knowing observer. Vor's role within the Norse pantheon is primarily focused on gathering and disseminating knowledge, making her a valuable, albeit understated, source of wisdom for the other gods and goddesses, and potentially for mortals who sought her favor. She is often associated with truth and the exposure of secrets, acting as a force against deception and hidden agendas. This makes her a figure of justice and clarity.
subtitle: The All-Knowing Goddess of Wisdom

keyMyths.title: Vor's Observation
keyMyths.description: Vor is always watching and nothing can be hidden from her. She sees all that happens in the nine realms and knows all secrets.

keyMyths.title: Seeking Vor's Wisdom
keyMyths.description: Mortals and deities alike may seek Vor's wisdom for guidance and clarity. She offers insight into complex situations and reveals hidden truths.

keyMyths.title: Vor and Frigg
keyMyths.description: Some believe Vor is an aspect of Frigg, Odin's wife, who also possesses great knowledge. This association highlights Vor's importance.

sources.author: Rudolf Simek
sources.description: Provides analysis and interpretation of Vor's role.
sources.text: Provides analysis and interpretation of Vor's role.

cross_cultural_parallels.name: God of Wisdom & Writing | Egyptian Mythology
